element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Swinging between platforms, grabbing power-ups (similar to Bionic Commando)

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Straightforward shooting action with varied environmental changes; more linear and intense than original Turrican series, closer to Contra series pacing

difficulty_curve.mid_game: Vehicle sections introduce mechanical variety; grappling arm platforming increases complexity
difficulty_curve.late_game: Underwater motojet sections and advanced enemy formations

notable_level_patterns.description: Devastated planet setting; introduction to standard run-and-gun mechanics; establishes narrative context of shipwreck on barren terrain
Breaks from on-foot combat with specialized vehicles (dune buggy, motorcycle, motojet); changes pacing and introduces environmental variety
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Mid-game transitions (dune buggy, space motorcycle, underwater motojet)

notable_level_patterns.description: Vertical and swinging challenges using the grappling arm mechanic; similar to Bionic Commando approach; tests precision and momentum control
Distinct environmental themes and aesthetics throughout the game; supports visual spectacle and environmental storytelling
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Progressive level design across all stages

sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Super Turrican 2 (game structure)
